title: Trump's China welcome ceremony goes viral as 'most cringe awkward display'
description: Trump landed in Beijing for a three-day summit with Xi, and the staged welcome ceremony — military band, honor guard, hundreds of waving Chinese children — took over US X timelines as clips of the awkward choreography racked up reposts. One viral reaction calling it 'the most cringe awkward display' became the day's defining quote-tweet.

title: Demi Moore's purple Cannes opening gown breaks the red carpet
description: On Cannes Day 1, Demi Moore stepped out in a showstopping head-to-toe purple gown that immediately dominated US fashion X. Posters dissected the silhouette frame-by-frame and the look anchored every red-carpet roundup the next morning.

title: 2022 'Hantavirus 2026' prediction tweet resurfaces after cruise-ship outbreak
description: A four-year-old X post predicting a 2026 hantavirus outbreak resurfaced and went viral after the WHO confirmed a rare cruise-ship outbreak that killed three passengers. The post bounced around US X all day with vaccine skeptics, prediction-conspiracy accounts, and journalists arguing whether it was prophecy or coincidence.

title: Elon's generic Mother's Day post and the 'he runs his mom's account' pile-on
description: Elon Musk posted a generic 'happy Mother's Day to mothers everywhere' message that conspicuously left out his own mom, Maye. Replies turned into a US X feeding frenzy when commenters resurfaced the running joke that Elon writes the tweets from Maye's account himself, with 'Pure cinema' becoming the catchphrase of the day.

title: Matt Damon's SNL Kavanaugh Bar cold open with Hegseth and Patel
description: Matt Damon hosted SNL and reprised his Brett Kavanaugh impression in a cold-open bar sketch, this time alongside Colin Jost as Pete Hegseth and Aziz Ansari as FBI Director Kash Patel. Mikey Day getting repeatedly spit-take sprayed turned into the day's most-shared clip and dominated US X by Sunday morning.

title: Trump's $6.9M no-bid contract to paint the Lincoln Reflecting Pool blue
description: Reporting broke that the Trump administration awarded a $6.9 million no-bid contract to Atlantic Industrial Coatings — a firm whose only prior work was at one of Trump's golf clubs — to reseal and paint the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool 'bright blue' before the July 4th 250th-anniversary celebrations. US X turned it into a one-day meme cycle.

title: Rutgers pulls pro-Palestine grad speaker as campus fights spill onto X
description: Rutgers rescinded a graduation speaker invitation over the speaker's pro-Palestinian views the same day the University of Michigan formally apologized for a professor's commencement address praising pro-Palestinian student activists. US X spent the day arguing both stories with academia, free-speech, and political accounts all piling in.
